title: The 4 Pillars of Real Estate Wealth

segments.text: Real estate doesn't build wealth one way. It builds wealth four ways at once.

Pillar one. Cash flow. On a five hundred thousand dollar rental, with twenty-five percent down, the rent covers the mortgage, taxes, insurance, and reserves. What's left over is yours. Maybe two hundred dollars a month. Modest. But it's income you didn't trade your hours for.

Pillar two. Appreciation. At around three percent a year, the long-run national average, that same five hundred thousand dollar property gains fifteen thousand dollars in year one. The next year, the gain stacks on the new value, not the old one. That's compounding doing the work.

Pillar three. Loan paydown. Your tenant's rent pays down your mortgage every month. On a three hundred seventy-five thousand dollar loan at seven percent, about three thousand eight hundred dollars of principal disappears in year one. You didn't fund it. They did. After thirty years, the loan is gone. The property is yours, free and clear.

Pillar four. Tax benefits. The I R S lets you depreciate the building's value over twenty-seven and a half years, even while the property gains market value. On a four hundred thousand dollar building basis, that's about fourteen thousand five hundred a year you write off. At a twenty-four percent tax bracket, that's about thirty-five hundred a year you keep instead of send to the I R S. Mortgage interest is deductible. And a ten thirty-one exchange defers capital gains.

Look at the four pillars together. At three years, around seventy-six thousand in equity. At five, one hundred thirty-one thousand. At ten, two hundred eighty-four thousand. At twenty, six hundred eighty-one thousand. That's not luck. That's four things compounding at the same time.
Each pillar alone is decent. Stacked together, they're the wealth most people can't see from the outside.

illustrationPrompts.beat-0-hero: Stylized vector illustration of four equal-height columns supporting a small modern house silhouette. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading, no photorealism. Color palette: navy #102742, gold #D4AF37, cream #faf8f4 background. Composition: centered, balanced negative space. No text, no signage, no people.
illustrationPrompts.beat-1-cash-flow: Stylized vector illustration of an open hand catching gold coins falling from a small house silhouette. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading. Color palette: gold coins, navy hand outline, cream background. Composition: house upper-left, hand lower-right, coin trail diagonal. No text, no people faces, no logos.
illustrationPrompts.beat-2-appreciation: Stylized vector illustration of a small house silhouette with a rising line graph behind it. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading. Color palette: navy graph line, gold house outline, cream background. Composition: graph axis bottom-left to upper-right, house centered. No numbers on the graph axis, no text, no logos.
illustrationPrompts.beat-3-loan-paydown: Stylized vector illustration of a key being passed between two abstract hand silhouettes, with a shrinking document beneath them. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading. Color palette: gold key, navy hand outlines, cream background, gray document. Composition: hands center frame, document below. No faces, no text on the document, no logos.
illustrationPrompts.beat-4-tax-benefits: Stylized vector illustration of a small house silhouette under a protective shield. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading. Color palette: navy shield outline, gold house, cream background. Composition: shield arcs over the house, centered. No text on the shield, no people, no logos.
illustrationPrompts.beat-6-outro: Stylized vector illustration of four equal-height columns supporting a small modern house silhouette with a subtle warm gold glow around the columns. Style: minimalist editorial vector, flat shading, no photorealism. Color palette: navy #102742, gold #D4AF37 with soft glow, cream #faf8f4 background. Composition: centered, balanced negative space, identical layout to beat-0-hero for bookend effect. No text, no signage, no people.

grokVideoPrompts.beat-1-cash-flow: Stylized vector illustration with gentle slow motion: gold coins falling softly into an open hand below a small house silhouette. Camera locked off, no zoom, no pan, no perspective change. Lighting flat and even. Style minimalist editorial vector identical to source still. Motion: subtle 5-7% downward translation on coins only; hand and house silhouette HOLD ABSOLUTELY STILL. Duration 5 seconds.
grokVideoPrompts.beat-6-outro: Stylized vector illustration with ambient warm gold glow gently pulsing around four columns supporting a small house. Camera locked off, no zoom, no pan. Lighting subtle warm gold glow that gently pulses. Style minimalist editorial vector identical to source still. Motion: glow opacity oscillates 0.4 to 0.8 to 0.4 once over 5 seconds; columns and house silhouette HOLD ABSOLUTELY STILL. Duration 5 seconds.
